spells.name: Execute
spells.description: Deals 200–520 (scales with level) plus 10% of enemy's lost HP as true damage to a designated enemy hero. Also grants 30% movement speed for 2 seconds upon killing with this skill.

spells.name: Retribution
spells.description: Deals 520–1160 (scales with level) true damage to nearby creeps or minions. After purchasing a jungling item, can also target enemy heroes, dealing reduced damage and slowing them by 40% for 0.5 seconds. Required for jungling.

spells.name: Inspire
spells.description: Increases attack speed by 55% and ignores 8 (+1 per level) of target's physical defense for 5 seconds. In the next 5 seconds, each basic attack deals an extra 25 physical damage.

spells.name: Sprint
spells.description: Increases movement speed by 42% for 6 seconds. Removes slow effects upon use.

spells.name: Aegis
spells.description: Generates a shield that absorbs 750 (+50 per level) damage for 5 seconds. Nearby allied heroes also receive 50% of the shield.

spells.name: Petrify
spells.description: Deals 100 magic damage to nearby enemies and petrifies them for 0.75 seconds. Petrified enemies cannot move, attack, or use skills.

spells.name: Purify
spells.description: Removes all debuffs and grants immunity to crowd control effects for 1.2 seconds. Also grants 15% movement speed during the immunity period.

spells.name: Flameshot
spells.description: Fires a flaming shot in a designated direction, dealing 160–640 (scales with level) magic damage (scales with magic power) to enemies hit and knocking them back. Damage increases the farther it travels.

spells.name: Flicker
spells.description: Teleports a short distance in a designated direction. The most versatile battle spell for repositioning.

spells.name: Arrival
spells.description: Teleports to a friendly turret or minion after channeling for 3 seconds. Gains 50% movement speed for 3 seconds upon arrival. Great for split-pushing and rotations.

spells.name: Vengeance
spells.description: Within the next 3 seconds, deals 35 (+25% of damage taken) magic damage back to the attacker each time you are hit by a basic attack. Also reduces damage taken by 35% during the duration.

spells.name: Revitalize
spells.description: Creates a healing area at your location for 4 seconds, continuously restoring HP to allied heroes inside (total healing 500 + 20 per level). Healing effect is enhanced by 25% for allies below 40% HP.
